channel.title: Agents on Archit's Space
channel.description: Recent content in Agents on Archit's Space

item.title: Hard Constraints Belong in Code: Designing Hybrid AI Agents for Constrained Optimization
item.description: A design principle for agentic systems that need real guarantees: let the LLM explore the solution space, let deterministic code enforce the rules, and wire them together through a feedback loop that catches what the model can't.
